generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure makes us vulnerable to cyberattacks? A recent incident showed how a single foreign-made component in our power grid could have been exploited. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy - we can't afford to be held hostage by foreign tech companies. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
